center.name: 夏尔·吕西安·波拿巴
center.summary: 夏尔·吕西安·波拿巴是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联32种鸟类，包括红头林䳍、非洲鸽、Horned coot等32种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|An illustration of an Arabian golden sparrow (above) and a yellow-throated petronia (below) by [[Henrik Grönvold]] The Arabian golden sparrow (Passer euchlorus) is a sparrow found in south west Arabia and also the coast of Somalia and Djibouti where it occurs in thorn savannah and scrub habitats

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Barolo shearwater (Puffinus baroli), also known as the North Atlantic little shearwater or Macaronesian shearwater, is a small shearwater which breeds in the Azores and Canaries of Macaronesia in the North Atlantic Ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Chilean skua, also known as the cinnamon skua (Stercorarius chilensis), is a large predatory seabird, which breeds in Argentina and Chile, but ranges as far north as Brazil and Peru when not breeding

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-crowned palm-tanager or grey-crowned tanager (Phaenicophilus poliocephalus) is a Near Threatened species of bird in the family Phaenicophilidae, the Hispaniolan palm-tanagers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | image = Tagua cornuda Horned coot (Fulica cornuta).JPG | image_caption = A horned coot on the nest at Miñiques Lagoon, San Pedro de Atacama, Antofagasta Region, Chile | status = NT | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Fulica | species = cornuta | authority = Bonaparte, 1853 | synonyms = | range_map = Fulica cornuta map.svg }} The horned coot (Fulica cornuta) is a species of bird found in the Andes of South America

birds.evidence: The long-tailed manakin (Chiroxiphia linearis) is a species of bird in the family Pipridae native to Central America where it inhabits both wet and dry tropical and subtropical forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The mangrove robin (Melanodryas pulverulenta) is a passerine bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The orange oriole (Icterus auratus) is a small bird species with orange feathers native to the Icteridae family in the Yucatán Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pale rockfinch or pale rock sparrow (Carpospiza brachydactyla) is a small sparrow found in the Middle East and Central Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plain-backed sparrow (Passer flaveolus), also called the Pegu sparrow or olive-backed sparrow, is a sparrow found in Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pyrrhuloxia or desert cardinal (Cardinalis sinuatus) is a medium-sized North American songbird found in the American southwest and northern Mexico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Scott's oriole (Icterus parisorum) is a medium-sized icterid (the same family as many blackbirds, meadowlarks, cowbirds, grackles, and others, including the New World orioles)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sumba eclectus, or Cornelia's eclectus (Eclectus cornelia) is a parrot species which is native to Sumba

birds.label: 分布于

birds.label: 分布于

birds.evidence: Cooper's hawk (Astur cooperii) is a medium-sized hawk native to the North American continent and found from southern Canada to Mexico.{{ cite book | last1=Ferguson-Lees | first1=J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The freckle-breasted woodpecker (Dendrocopos analis) is a species of bird in the family Picidae. It is found in Indonesia, Laos, Myanmar, Thailand, Cambodia, and Vietnam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Pel's fishing owl (Scotopelia peli) is a large species of owl in the family Strigidae, found in Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Torresian crow (Corvus orru), also called the Australian crow or Papuan crow, is a passerine bird in the crow family native to the north and west of Australia and nearby islands in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fire-capped tit (Cephalopyrus flammiceps) is a small, long, weighing about bird species assigned to the family Paridae, that breeds in the temperate forest bordering the Himalayas to the south, in the Hengduan Shan and Nujiang Shan on the Myanmar-China border, the Micah Shan and Daba Shan on the Northern Sichuan border
